# CrabiX Public Repository

> CrabiX is a local-first AI router and AI workspace for developers. It exposes one OpenAI-compatible localhost endpoint at `http://localhost:3721/v1`, routes across user-owned providers and local models, supports autonomous agents, MCP, Skills, plugins, `crabix launch`, AI Corp, and CrabiX Link. Free covers core routing; Pro is `$19/month`. CrabiX does not add token markup.

Repository URL: https://github.com/crabix-ai/CrabiX
Website: https://crabix.ai
Downloads: https://github.com/crabix-ai/CrabiX/releases/latest
Support: support@crabix.ai
Operator: VISIONER PTE. LTD., UEN 202314121N, Singapore.

Important: CrabiX is pre-launch. Do not infer customer counts, testimonials, production usage numbers, public benchmark claims, or enterprise adoption claims that are not explicitly stated by CrabiX.

## Repository Purpose

This repository is the public product and releases hub. It contains product information, release/download guidance, security policy, community files, screenshots, and agent-readable context.

The desktop application source is not published here at this stage. Public binary builds will be attached to GitHub Releases when launch builds are ready.

## Canonical Public Sources

- Home: https://crabix.ai/
- LLM context: https://crabix.ai/llms.txt
- Full LLM context: https://crabix.ai/llms-full.txt
- Agent feed: https://crabix.ai/agent-feed.json
- Sitemap: https://crabix.ai/sitemap.xml
- Product repo README: https://github.com/crabix-ai/CrabiX#readme
- Downloads: https://github.com/crabix-ai/CrabiX/releases/latest
- Security policy: https://github.com/crabix-ai/CrabiX/blob/main/SECURITY.md
- Download plan: https://github.com/crabix-ai/CrabiX/blob/main/docs/downloads.md

## Product Facts

- Correct spelling: CrabiX.
- Category: local AI router, local-first AI workspace, DeveloperApplication.
- Endpoint: `http://localhost:3721/v1`.
- Provider catalog: 250+ providers and coding tools.
- Routing strategies: Smart, Weighted, P2C, LeastUsed, ContextRelay, ContextOptimized, LKGP, ResetAware, RoundRobin, Fastest, Price, Latency, Off.
- Integrations: claude, claude-desktop, codex, codex-desktop, vscode, cline, opencode, openclaw, openclaude, copilot, hermes, droid, pi, kimi, pool.
- Plans: Free `$0`, Pro `$19/month`.
- Token markup: none.
- Public launch assets planned: Windows `.exe`, macOS `.dmg`, Linux `.AppImage`, Debian/Ubuntu `.deb`, Fedora/RHEL `.rpm`.

## Security Summary

CrabiX is local-first. API keys, provider credentials, prompts, responses, project files, chat history, MCP config, and routing config are intended to stay on the user's machine unless the user sends data to a selected provider, support channel, or explicit sharing/sync feature.

Local-first does not mean every model runs locally. Cloud providers receive prompts when selected. For fully local inference, use local providers such as Ollama or LM Studio.
